control.bang.description: send the value when the bang input changes

control.bipolar.description: Creates a bipolar mod signal from a 0...1 range

control.blend.description: Blends the two input values based on the Alpha parameter.

control.branch_cable.description: Send the incoming value to a single output

control.cable_expr.description: evaluates an expression for the control value

control.cable_pack.description: Uses a slider pack to modify a modulation signal

control.cable_table.description: Modify a modulation signal using a lookup table

control.change.description: Filters out repetitions of the same value

control.clone_cable.description: Send different values to cloned nodes

control.clone_forward.description: forwards the unscaled input parameter to all clones

control.clone_pack.description: control cloned parameters with a slider pack

control.compare.description: compares the input signals and outputs either 1.0 or 0.0

control.delay_cable.description: Delays the message by a given amount

control.file_analyser.description: Extracts file information (pitch, length, etc) and sends it as modulation signal on file load

control.input_toggle.description: Switch between two input values as modulation signal

control.intensity.description: applies the HISE modulation intensity to the value

control.locked_mod.description: Adds a scaled modulation dragger to its immediate locked node container parent

control.locked_mod_unscaled.description: Adds a unscaled modulation dragger to its immediate locked node container parent

control.logic_op.description: Combines the (binary) input signals using a logic operator

control.minmax.description: Scales the input value to a modifyable range

control.pack2_writer.description: Writes the values from the parameter sliders into a slider pack

control.pack3_writer.description: Writes the values from the parameter sliders into a slider pack

control.pack4_writer.description: Writes the values from the parameter sliders into a slider pack

control.pack5_writer.description: Writes the values from the parameter sliders into a slider pack

control.pack6_writer.description: Writes the values from the parameter sliders into a slider pack

control.pack7_writer.description: Writes the values from the parameter sliders into a slider pack

control.pack8_writer.description: Writes the values from the parameter sliders into a slider pack

control.pma.description: Scales and offsets a modulation signal

control.pma_unscaled.description: multiplies and adds an offset to an unscaled modulation signal

control.ppq.description: Sends a modulation signal with the playback position in quarters when the clock starts.

control.resetter.description: Sends an inverted impulse (0,1) to reset gate-like parameters

control.sliderbank.description: Scale a value with a slider pack and send it to multiple targets

control.tempo_sync.description: Sends the tempo duration as modulation signal

control.transport.description: Sends a modulation signal when the transport state changes

control.voice_bang.description: sends out the current value when a voice is started (note-on is received)

control.xfader.description: Apply a crossfade to multiple outputs

envelope.voice_manager.description: Sends a voice reset message when `Value < 0.5`

routing.public_mod.description: Creates a modulation signal slot in the compiled node / nested network

analyse.oscilloscope.description: an oscilloscope with optional MIDI input sync

container.branch.description: Processes a single child based on the branch index

container.chain.description: A container for serial processing of nodes

container.clone.description: An array of equal nodes with dynamic resizing

container.dynamic_blocksize.description: A container that processes its childnode with a dynamic buffer size

container.fix128_block.description: Split the audio signal into fixed length chunks of 128 samples.

container.fix16_block.description: Split the audio signal into fixed length chunks of 16 samples.

container.fix256_block.description: Split the audio signal into fixed length chunks of 256 samples.

container.fix32_block.description: Split the audio signal into fixed length chunks of 32 samples.

container.fix64_block.description: Split the audio signal into fixed length chunks of 64 samples.

container.fix8_block.description: Split the audio signal into fixed length chunks of 8 samples.

container.fix_blockx.description: Split the audio signal into adjustable fixed length chunks

container.frame1_block.description: Per sample processing for 1 audio channels

container.frame2_block.description: Per sample processing for 2 audio channels

container.framex_block.description: Enables per sample processing for the child nodes.

container.midichain.description: Sends MIDI events to child nodes

container.modchain.description: a serial chain optimized for modulation sources

container.multi.description: Process every channel with a different child node

container.no_midi.description: Prevents child nodes from processing MIDI events

container.oversample.description: Processes the child nodes with a higher samplerate

container.oversample16x.description: Processes the child nodes with a higher samplerate

container.oversample2x.description: Processes the child nodes with a higher samplerate

container.oversample4x.description: Processes the child nodes with a higher samplerate

container.oversample8x.description: Processes the child nodes with a higher samplerate

container.repitch.description: Resamples the audio signal and processes its child nodes with a different sample rate

container.sidechain.description: Creates a empty audio by duplicating the channel amount for sidechain routing.

container.split.description: Processes each node independently and sums up the output.

control.midi.description: Create a modulation signal from MIDI input

control.timer.description: Create a periodic modulation signal if active

core.clock_ramp.description: Creates a ramp signal that is synced to the HISE clock

core.file_player.description: A simple file player with multiple playback modes

core.fm.description: A FM oscillator that uses the signal input as FM source

core.gain.description: A gain module with decibel range and parameter smoothing

core.matrix_mod.description: A modulator that connects to global modulators with the feature set of the modulation matrix

core.mono2stereo.description: converts a mono signal to a stereo signal (`L->L+R`)

core.oscillator.description: A tone generator with multiple waveforms

core.peak.description: create a modulation signal from the (absolute) input magnitude

core.peak_unscaled.description: create a raw modulation signal from the input

core.phasor.description: A oscillator that creates a naive ramp from 0...1

core.phasor_fm.description: A ramp oscillator with FM modulation from the input signal

core.pitch_mod.description: Picks up the pitch modulation signal from the parent sound generator

core.ramp.description: Creates a ramp signal that can be used as modulation source

core.recorder.description: Record the signal input into a audio file slot

core.smoother.description: Smoothes the input signal using a low pass filter

core.snex_node.description: A generic SNEX node with the complete callback set

core.snex_osc.description: A custom oscillator node using SNEX

dynamics.comp.description: A compressor with the ducking amount as modulation signal

dynamics.gate.description: A gate effect with the ducking amount as modulation signal

dynamics.limiter.description: A limiter with the ducking amount as modulation signal

dynamics.updown_comp.description: A compressor with adjustable knee, RMS detection and upwards compression

envelope.extra_mod_gate.description: Sends a On-Off modulation signal while the extra modulator is active.

envelope.flex_ahdsr.description: A more advanced AHDSR with draggable curves & more playback modes

envelope.global_mod_gate.description: Sends a On-Off modulation signal while the global modulator is active.

envelope.silent_killer.description: Send a voice reset message as soon when silence is detected

fx.haas.description: A Haas effect (simulate stereo position using delay)

fx.phase_delay.description: A phase delay for comb filtering

fx.pitch_shift.description: A pitch shifting node using the signalsmith timestretcher

fx.sampleandhold.description: A sample and hold effect node

jdsp.jdelay.description: A linear interpolating delay line with low computational cost and a low-pass filtering effect.

jdsp.jdelay_cubic.description: A delay line using a 3rd order Lagrange interpolator. Flat amplitude response, modulatable but the highest CPU usage

jdsp.jdelay_thiran.description: A delay line using the thiran interpolation. Good performance, flat amplitude response but not suitable for fast modulation

math.abs.description: Calculates the absolute signal (folds negative values).

math.add.description: Adds a scalar value to the signal

math.clear.description: Clears the signal (sets it to zero).

math.clip.description: Truncates the signal range (on both ends) using the Value as limit

math.div.description: Divides the signal by scalar value != 0.0

math.expr.description: A JIT compiled math expression using SNEX.

math.fill1.description: Fills the signal with a constant 1.0

math.fmod.description: Calculates the floating point modulo from the signal.

math.intensity.description: Applies the HISE intensity formula to the input signal

math.inv.description: Inverts the phase of a signal

math.map.description: A math operator that maps a signal from one range to another

math.mod2sig.description: Converts a 0...1 signal to a -1...1 signal.

math.mod_inv.description: Inverts a modulation signal from 0-1 to 1-0

math.mul.description: Multiplies the signal with a scalar value

math.pack.description: Processes the signal with the slider pack as LUT function

math.pow.description: Calculates the pow function of the signal with the Value as exponent.

math.rect.description: Rectifies a normalised signal to 0 or 1

math.sig2mod.description: Converts a -1...1 signal to a 0...1 signal.

math.sin.description: Applies the sin function on the signal.

math.sqrt.description: Applies the sqrt function on the signal.

math.sub.description: Subtracts a scalar value from the signal

math.table.description: Processes the signal with the table as LUT function

math.tanh.description: Applies the tanh function on the signal.

routing.event_data_reader.description: reads data that was written to the event ID storage of the global routing manager

routing.event_data_writer.description: writes data to the event ID storage of the global routing manager

routing.global_receive.description: Send the signal anywhere in HISE!

routing.global_send.description: Send the signal anywhere in HISE!

routing.matrix.description: A dynamic routing matrix for any arbitrary channel routing

routing.receive.description: A signal target for a send node with adjustable feedback

routing.selector.description: A dynamic router of the first channel (pair)

routing.send.description: Send the signal to one or more targets
